carousel.heading: Four service lines. One growth stack.
carousel.description: Web development, digital marketing, custom software you own, and AI agents — built for Indian search and revenue growth.

webDevelopment.title: Web Development
webDevelopment.description: Fast, conversion-ready websites, web apps, and ecommerce engineered for performance and Indian search intent.

digitalMarketing.title: Digital Marketing
digitalMarketing.description: Paid media, brand systems, and technical SEO run as one connected growth layer for Indian markets.

customSoftware.title: Custom Software
customSoftware.description: Billing, ops, lead management, and data orchestration you own for life — no subscription lock-in.

aiAgents.title: AI Agents and Automations
aiAgents.description: AI agents and workflow automations that qualify leads, route follow-ups, and reduce manual ops.

index.title: Services built for Indian search and revenue growth
index.description: Four integrated service lines — web, marketing, custom software, and AI automation — built for Indian search intent, city-level SEO, and conversion operations that scale.
index.servicesSubheading: Each line is a full delivery stack — strategy, build, and iteration — not a menu of disconnected tasks.

web-development.name: Web Development
web-development.headline: Fast, conversion-ready sites and web apps
web-development.intro: We build fast, scalable websites and web apps engineered for organic visibility, conversion rate, and operational efficiency — from marketing sites to ecommerce storefronts.
web-development.feature4: Core Web Vitals and analytics instrumentation

digital-marketing.name: Digital Marketing
digital-marketing.headline: Ads, brand systems, and search that compound
digital-marketing.intro: Paid media, brand systems, and technical SEO as one connected growth engine — messaging, audiences, and measurement aligned from first click to qualified pipeline.
digital-marketing.feature1: Meta and Google Ads with shared tracking
digital-marketing.feature2: Branding systems and trust signal architecture
digital-marketing.feature3: Technical SEO, schema, and local search clusters

custom-software.name: Custom Software
custom-software.headline: Built for your ops — own it for life
custom-software.intro: Billing, business management, lead management, internal ops, and data orchestration — no subscription lock-in. On-demand features; monthly EMI available during build, then yours for life.
custom-software.feature5: On-demand features — pay once, own forever

ai-agents-automations.name: AI Agents and Automations
ai-agents-automations.headline: Agents that qualify, route, and follow up
ai-agents-automations.intro: AI agents and automation workflows across lead capture, qualification, follow-ups, and reporting — faster response without replacing relationship-driven sales.
ai-agents-automations.feature2: WhatsApp, email, and CRM workflow automations
ai-agents-automations.feature4: Secure API integrations with your existing stack
